_instructions: Copy this file to manual_inputs.json and fill in all fields before running a live audit.
Fields marked REQUIRED must be filled in — they cannot be derived from the Klaviyo API.
Fields marked OPTIONAL can be left at their defaults if data is unavailable.

profiles._note: Pull these from Klaviyo: Analytics → Profiles, or from Klaviyo segment membership counts.

campaigns._note: Pull from Klaviyo: Analytics → Campaigns → select the audit date range.

deliverability._note: SPF/DKIM/DMARC: check via MXToolbox or Klaviyo Settings → Email → Sending Domain. Rates: from campaign analytics.

flows._note: Keyed by any substring of the flow name (case-insensitive). Add flow revenue from Klaviyo Analytics → Flows.

forms._note: Add one entry per active signup form. Name must match the form name in Klaviyo.
forms.name: Homepage Popup

revenue._note: Pull from Klaviyo: Analytics → Revenue. Set revenue_attribution_configured to false if Placed Order metric is missing.

benchmarks._note: OPTIONAL. Set ratings based on Klaviyo benchmark comparison if available. Values: poor | below_average | average | good | excellent

billing._note: Pull from Klaviyo: Settings → Billing. plan_profile_limit is the profile count included in the plan.

segmentation._note: OPTIONAL. Overrides auto-detection from segment/list names. Leave out keys to use auto-detection.
segmentation._auto_detect_note: The system auto-detects segments by name pattern. Only override here if names are ambiguous.

account_context._note: sms_enabled: null = auto-detect from API data. Set to true/false to override.
